finding_results.notes: Recast the three cited pressure exchanges to separate idiolects: Malcolm now uses legal/procedural framing (triage, privilege, probate, merits), Ada uses technical conservation/legal-integrity language plus blunt boundary stance (hashes, chain-of-custody, traceable accountability), and Luis uses plainspoken recovery pragmatics with shift-work/rent metaphor. This removes interchangeable maxim cadence and restores speaker-specific register under pressure.

summary: Addressed all packet findings for the dialogue/idiolect/cadence pass in chapter_15 by differentiating Malcolm, Ada, and Luis voice signatures at the cited beats while preserving continuity, heading contract, and high-pressure colloquial cadence.
